commit.message:
feat(survey-v2): add clinical depth chips for goal-specific questioning (Issue #1)

- Add 7 new ChipType values: tightening_zone, scar_type, pigment_detail,
  aging_priority, texture_concern, laxity_severity, treatment_budget
- Add 4-language (KO/EN/JP/ZH-CN) chip templates for all 7 new types
- Update generate-chips.ts with goal-specific branching:
  • Contouring/lifting → tightening_zone + laxity_severity
  • Brightening → pigment_detail
  • Anti-aging → aging_priority + laxity_severity
  • Texture/pores → texture_concern
  • Acne/scarring → scar_type + texture_concern
  • Always: treatment_budget
- Update analyze-open.ts Haiku prompt to detect new clinical signals
- Increase max chips from 6 → 8 for clinical depth coverage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: create in-process helper window so TrackPopupMenuEx works in console app

GetConsoleWindow() returns an HWND owned by conhost.exe/Windows Terminal
(a different process), causing TrackPopupMenuEx to fail silently.
Fix: register a minimal WS_POPUP window class and create a 1x1 hidden
window in our own process/thread to use as the owner HWND. The helper
window is created before and destroyed after each menu invocation.

commit.message:
Fix Invalid JWT — auto-retry on 401 with force-refreshed token

The Supabase gateway rejects stale JWTs from localStorage after OAuth
redirects. Instead of pre-checking expiry (which can miss invalid
signatures), the invoke() method now:
1. Makes the request with the current token
2. On 401, force-refreshes via refreshSession()
3. Retries exactly once with the fresh token

Also ensures ensureValidSession() always force-refreshes in
AuthCallback as a belt-and-suspenders defense.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix Invalid JWT — bypass getSession() cache, use token directly from refresh

Root cause: ensureValidSession() refreshes the token successfully, but
functions.invoke() independently calls getSession() which returns the
STALE cached session, not the freshly refreshed one. The stale JWT hits
the Supabase gateway and gets rejected as "Invalid JWT".

Fix: AuthCallback now calls the edge function directly via fetch() using
the access_token returned by ensureValidSession(), completely bypassing
the getSession() cache layer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Detect background tasks to prevent false idle state in tab

When Claude Code runs background tasks (run_in_background Bash or
background Agents), the Stop hook fires before background work completes,
incorrectly showing idle (green ✓). Now the hook scripts walk down from
the Claude process checking for descendant shell processes; if found,
state stays "running" instead of switching to "idle".

commit.message:
fix: Mermaid — JS пост-рендер для автоматического контраста текста

CSS-подход не работал из-за конфликта cascade: base.scss задаёт
p,text { color/fill: var(--darkgray) } что побеждает Mermaid per-node styles.

Решение: после mermaid.run() итерируем по нодам, проверяем luminance
фона (WCAG формула), принудительно ставим #fff или #1a1a1a на text/p.

Функция isColorDark(): hex (#rgb, #rrggbb), rgb(), rgba() → bool.

commit.message:
docs: add decision map for all customization systems

Address feedback that concepts (modes, process weight, shitsuke, safety)
are spread across multiple layers and hard to navigate at first glance.

- Replace "Two Layers" section with unified Decision Map in both READMEs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add AMQPRPCClient for RPC-style messaging with direct reply-to (#191)

* Add RPC client and server with session integration

Add AMQPRPCClient (direct reply-to) and AMQPRPCServer (queue-based)
for request-response messaging. Both integrate with AMQPSession:

- session.rpcClient() creates a reusable client tracked for reconnect recovery
- session.rpcServer(queue, handler) creates a server using session queue subscribe
- session.rpcCall(queue, body) does a one-shot RPC call

RPC clients get automatic recovery on reconnect. RPC servers recover
through the existing queue/subscription machinery. session.stop()
cleans up everything.

* Address review feedback: simplify RPC handler, remove oneshot rpcCall

- Simplify RPCHandler signature from (body, msg) to just (msg)
- Remove session.rpcCall() one-shot convenience method
- Add comment explaining unmatched correlationId behavior in RPC client
- Flatten nested if-statements in RPC client consumer callback
- Update README, CHANGELOG, and all tests

https://claude.ai/code/session_016fEPinum7XFHdDBqX54iAn

* Restore rpcCall as the recommended high-level RPC API

rpcCall is the simplest entry point for most users. rpcClient is the
optimization for high-throughput scenarios that need to avoid per-call
channel overhead. Updated docs and comments to reflect this.

https://claude.ai/code/session_016fEPinum7XFHdDBqX54iAn

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Invalid JWT — force session refresh when token is expired after OAuth redirect

Previous fix waited for session presence but not validity. Now:

commit.message:
Skip infeasible suggestions — locked, inside instances, structural frames

Add editable() guard: visible + not locked + not inside an instance.
Nodes inside component instances cannot have styles applied directly
(must edit the main component), so they are excluded from text and
fill checks.

Fill check now scans only RECTANGLE and ELLIPSE — FRAME nodes are
structural layout containers that don't need fill styles, and
INSTANCE/COMPONENT fills are managed via the component itself.

Instance-level UX/a11y checks (touch targets, primary CTAs, etc.)
remain observational so they only filter visible + not locked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: wire Hebbian seed confidence into DSP cache gate + fix naive cache

DSP signal chain now receives real cache_confidence from HebbianSynaptic:
- Buddhi.pre_flight(seed=) looks up per-seed Hebbian weight
- High confidence seeds → DSP cache gate attenuates budget (agent responds concisely)
- Continuous: gain *= (1.0 - confidence * 0.5), not a hard switch

Cache hardening (was dangerously naive):
- Cache HIT requires Hebbian confidence > 0.7 (~5 successful uses of same seed)
- Cache STORE requires confidence > 0.7 (no first-success caching)
- Short TTL: 60 seconds (agent context changes fast, stale cache is toxic)
- Hebbian learning runs BEFORE cache store (learn first, then decide to cache)
- First-success caching eliminated — the response might have been mediocre

The old cache was a tape recorder. The new cache is confidence-gated:
seed seen 1x → no cache. seed seen 5x successfully → cache with 60s TTL.

859 tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: コピー失敗時にフォールバックなしで Google が開くバグを修正

navigator.clipboard.writeText() の Promise を await せず .catch() も
フォールバックを実行しないため、コピーが静かに失敗したまま Google が
開いていた。async/await + try/catch に書き直し、失敗時は execCommand
フォールバックが確実に動作するよう修正。

commit.message:
fix(reflex): thread-safe init, bounded candidates, assert→RuntimeError

Addresses code quality findings from deep analysis:

P1: Race condition in _reflex_compiler lazy init — added double-check
    locking with threading.Lock (was unprotected global assignment)
P1: Unbounded _candidates growth — added max_candidates=max_entries*2
    with LRU eviction via OrderedDict (was unlimited dict)
P2: assert in production code (_precipitate) — replaced with explicit
    RuntimeError for -O safety
P2: Hardcoded threshold:3 in S1 response — now uses
    REFLEX_PRECIPITATION_HITS from constants.py (SSOT)
P3: Unused evicted_hash variable — removed (2 occurrences)

57 tests GREEN (0 regressions)
